languages.text: "Жди, я отключу что-нибудь в селении и вернусь".

traits.locale_text: "Жди, я отключу что-нибудь в селении и вернусь".

languages.text: "Wait. I will shut down something in the settlement and return."
languages.original_text: "Жди, я отключу что-нибудь в селении и вернусь".

traits.locale_text: "Wait. I will shut down something in the settlement and return."
"Wait. I will shut down something in the settlement and return."
"Wait. I will shut down something in the settlement and return."

languages.text: «Espere. Desconectaré algo en el asentamiento y volveré».
languages.original_text: "Wait. I will shut down something in the settlement and return."

traits.locale_text: «Espere. Desconectaré algo en el asentamiento y volveré».

languages.text: “等着。我去定居点里关闭一些设备再回来。”
languages.original_text: "Wait. I will shut down something in the settlement and return."

traits.locale_text: “等着。我去定居点里关闭一些设备再回来。”

languages.text: « Attendez ici. Je vais couper le courant quelque part, et je reviens. »
languages.original_text: "Wait. I will shut down something in the settlement and return."

traits.locale_text: « Attendez ici. Je vais couper le courant quelque part, et je reviens. »

languages.text: "Bekle. Yerleşimdeki bir şeyleri kapatıp geri döneceğim."
languages.original_text: "Wait. I will shut down something in the settlement and return."

traits.locale_text: "Bekle. Yerleşimdeki bir şeyleri kapatıp geri döneceğim."

languages.text: "Wartet. Ich schalte in der Siedlung etwas ab und komme dann wieder."
languages.original_text: "Wait. I will shut down something in the settlement and return."

traits.locale_text: "Wartet. Ich schalte in der Siedlung etwas ab und komme dann wieder."

languages.text: 「待て。私はこの村で何かを閉鎖して戻ってくる。」
languages.original_text: "Wait. I will shut down something in the settlement and return."
